birthPlace.address: Arques la Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
EMMA .  "Willelmus Vernonensis filius Hugonis eiusque conjux Emma" donated property at "castrum Vernonense" to Sainte-Trinité de Rouen, with the consent of "Willelmo rege Anglorum et duce Normannorum", by undated charter[848].  Guillaume de Vernon, his son Hugues and his wife Emma donated property to Rouen Holy Trinity, confirmed in the charter dated to [1067][849].  Her parentage is confirmed by a charter of Carisbrooke Priory, Isle of Wight which names “Johannem et Ricardum” as the two sons of “Willielmum filium Osberni marescallum…comitem Herefordiæ” who predeceased their father, and records that their inheritance went to “Ricardo de Rivers, nepoti prædicti Willielmi filii Osberni, tunc comiti Exoniæ”[850].  m GUILLAUME de Vernon, son of HUGUES de Vernon & his wife --- (-[4 Jun ----]).
http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/normacre.htm#GuillaumeFitzOsbernHereforddied1071A

zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma FitzOsbern於大約1024年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾時，她的父親Osbern the Steward de Crépon36歲，母親Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux34歲。她和Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1095年在法國諾門迪享年73歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯沙特-馬利。

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma FitzOsbern was born about 1024, in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, was 36 and her mother, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, was 34. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon. She died about 1095, in Normandy, France, at the age of 73, and was buried in Sainte-Marie, Calvados, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma FitzOsbern est née environ 1024, à Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon. Elle est décédée environ 1095, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Sainte-Marie, Calvados, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma FitzOsbern um 1024 in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Osbern the Steward de Crépon 36 und ihre Mutter Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux 34. Sie hatte mit Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1095 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Sainte-Marie, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma FitzOsbern è nata il circa 1024 nel Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon. Morì circa 1095, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Sainte-Marie, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma FitzOsbernが約1024年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアルクエス-ラ-バティイルで生まれた時，父Osbern the Steward de Créponは36歳，母Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeuxは34歳であった。彼女はGuillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1095年にフランスノーマンディで73歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスサインテ-マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma FitzOsbern(이)가 대략 1024년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 아크스-라-바테이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Osbern the Steward de Crépon(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1095년 프랑스 노먼디에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 세인테-마이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma FitzOsbern nasceu aproximadamente 1024, em Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1095, em Normandie, França, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Sainte-Marie, Calvados, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma FitzOsbern родилась около 1024 г. в местности аркуес-ла-батеилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Osbern the Steward de Crépon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon. Она умерла около 1095 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинте-мари, калвадос, норманди, Франция.

sm.about 1024–about 1095: e tusa o le 1024–e tusa o le 1095

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma FitzOsbern nació aproximadamente 1024, en Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon. Murió aproximadamente 1095, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Sainte-Marie, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.
